mnemonics.title: K-Means Steps
mnemonics.content: Keep (K) Moving Centers Until Stable: 1. K centroids 2. Move points 3. Update centers 4. Stop when stable

mnemonics.title: Linkage Methods
mnemonics.content: Single Link = SHORTest bridge, Complete Link = LONGest bridge, Average Link = MEAN bridge

visualTips.visualization: Imagine centroids as magnets pulling similar data points
Picture horizontal line moving down dendrogram to select clusters

analogies.analogy: Like grouping people by similar T-shirt sizes in a crowd
Similar to Russian nesting dolls with clusters within clusters
